name: Iter13 — Delete buttons + Comparison detail page + share link
description: Verify delete button on reviews table in History, View/Delete buttons on Comparisons page, and the /comparisons/:id detail page with Copy Share Link button.

planSteps.description: The History page loads and shows the reviews table with column headers including Repository, PR Title, Score, Verdict
Each review row in the table has a delete button (🗑️) visible in the Actions column
Each review row also has a view link button (🔗) visible next to the delete button
The 'Saved Comparisons' heading is visible on the page
Either the comparisons table with '🔗 View' and '🗑️' action buttons is visible, OR the empty state message 'No comparisons saved yet' is visible
A '+ New Comparison' button is visible
The Compare Two PRs page loads correctly with Old PR URL and New PR URL inputs
